qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt saved. Mohamed Touré (Australia) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Matt Freese (USA).
Foul by Weston McKennie (USA).
Attempt blocked. Ricardo Pepi (USA) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Weston McKennie with a cross.

events.description: 里卡多·佩皮射门被封堵。 韦斯顿·麦肯尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Folarin Balogun (USA).
Tyler Adams (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Sergiño Dest (USA) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Weston McKennie.

events.description: 塞尔吉诺·德斯特射门被封堵。 韦斯顿·麦肯尼参与进攻。
卡梅伦·伯吉斯 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Mathew Leckie (Australia) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses the top left corner. Assisted by Nishan Velupillay.

events.description: 马修·莱基射门偏出。 尼山·维鲁皮莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, USA. Conceded by Cameron Burgess.
Attempt blocked. Weston McKennie (USA) header from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Malik Tillman with a cross.

events.description: 韦斯顿·麦肯尼射门被封堵。 马利克·蒂尔曼参与进攻。

events.description: 韦斯顿·麦肯尼射门偏出。 马利克·蒂尔曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Weston McKennie (USA).

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ricardo Pepi (USA) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Sergiño Dest with a cross.

events.description: 里卡多·佩皮射门偏出。 塞尔吉诺·德斯特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Sergiño Dest (USA) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Antonee Robinson.

events.description: 塞尔吉诺·德斯特射门被封堵。 安东尼·罗宾逊参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Goal USA 2-0 Australia (Alex Freeman).

Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时2分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, USA. Conceded by Alessandro Circati.
Foul by Chris Richards (USA).
Foul by Weston McKennie (USA).
Handball by Jordan Bos (Australia).
Attempt saved. Sergiño Dest (USA) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Patrick Beach (Australia). Assisted by Alex Freeman.

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, USA 2, Australia 0.
